landing.heroSubtitle: Learn AI-assisted programming – from basics to pro. Structured lessons, quizzes, live challenges, and an official certificate.
landing.featureLessonsDesc: Structured course in 3 levels: Basics, Advanced, Expert. From setup to multi-agent orchestration.
landing.featureChallengesDesc: Live coding, spaced repetition, and hands-on projects for lasting learning.
landing.featureCertDesc: Official certificate upon completing quizzes and project requirements.
landing.ctaText: Ready to get started? Read the docs or register now.
landing.sectionWhyLead: Claude Code is Anthropic's AI coding assistant – right in your IDE. In this course you'll learn to use it effectively.
landing.sectionWhy1: Develop faster with natural language and precise code suggestions.
landing.sectionWhy2: Use MCP servers, skills, and subagents for complex workflows.
landing.sectionWhy3: Best practices for prompting, security, and production use.
landing.sectionWhatIntro: From first steps to orchestrating multiple agents – all in your language.
landing.sectionWhatItems: Basics & setup, CLAUDE.md, MCP & skills, custom agents, Git integration, hooks & slash commands, troubleshooting, CI/CD.
landing.heroBenefit1: Structured course – from basics to expert
landing.heroBenefit3: Fully in your language, at your own pace
landing.trustLine: Start with no commitment · No credit card required
landing.videoHeroTitle: Learn to Code with AI in 27 Lessons
landing.videoHeroSubtitle: From zero to production-ready code - with Claude Code as your personal co-pilot.

founder.story1: I created the Claude Code Masterkurs because I want to show everyone how to become productive with AI - not dependent on it.
founder.story2: A year ago I faced the same problem as many: learning to code takes forever, bootcamps cost thousands, and YouTube tutorials are unstructured. Then I discovered Claude Code - and everything changed.
founder.story3: Since then I've built dozens of projects with AI and learned what really works. I now share this knowledge in 27 structured lessons so you can learn in weeks what takes others months.
founder.mission: My mission: Teach everyone how to use AI as a co-pilot - not as a replacement, but as an amplifier of your skills.
founder.imageAlt: Cosmo - Founder of Claude Code Masterkurs

testimonials.title: What our students say
testimonials.subtitle: Experiences from participants who got started with the Claude Code Masterkurs.
testimonials.disclaimer: * Placeholder testimonials - real reviews coming soon
testimonials.quote1: Finally a course that truly explains Claude Code from the ground up. The structured lessons and hands-on projects helped me build my first SaaS in 3 weeks.
testimonials.quote2: As a beginner, I was sceptical whether AI-assisted coding would work for me. After lesson 5 I was convinced - now I save hours every day at work.
testimonials.quote3: The MCP server and multi-agent lessons are pure gold. I introduced the patterns directly in our team. Productivity increased by at least 40%.
testimonials.quote4: From marketing to coding - Claude Code made the transition so much easier. The course gives you the confidence to build your own projects.

review.title: Spaced Repetition
review.subtitle: Review due lessons at the optimal interval – so what you learn stays in long-term memory.
review.noDue: No reviews due. Use the time for new lessons or the playground!
review.allDoneDesc: Check back tomorrow or start a new lesson.
review.howItWorks1: Lessons are automatically scheduled for review when you complete them or the associated quiz.
review.howItWorks2: Intervals: 1 day → 3 days → 7 days → 14 days (when you choose "Remembered").
review.howItWorks3: When you choose "Read again", the interval resets to 1 day.
review.rememberObjectives: Do you remember the following learning objectives?

playground.selectProjectDesc: Select a project on the left and practice Claude Code commands in the interactive CLI simulation.

quiz.matchingInstruction: Match the commands to the correct descriptions

challenges.title: Live Coding Challenges
challenges.subtitle: Claude Code challenges and algorithm live coding (separate from projects). From FizzBuzz to Sliding Window Maximum – including tough nuts.
challenges.noChallenges: No challenges found for this filter.

ch-01.title: Create a CLAUDE.md file
ch-01.description: Write a basic CLAUDE.md configuration for a Node.js project.

ch-02.title: Build CLI command
ch-02.description: Construct the correct Claude Code CLI command for a given scenario.

ch-03.title: Simple prompt with context
ch-03.description: Write an effective prompt for Claude Code with context.

ch-04.title: MCP Server configuration
ch-04.description: Configure an MCP server for Claude Code with correct JSON syntax.

ch-05.title: Hook script for Pre-Commit
ch-05.description: Write a Claude Code hook script for automatic code checks.

ch-06.title: Prompt with system context
ch-06.description: Create an advanced prompt with system context and chain-of-thought.

ch-07.title: CLAUDE.md for Monorepo
ch-07.description: Create a CLAUDE.md configuration for a complex monorepo project.

ch-08.title: Custom Agent Personality
ch-08.description: Design a complete agent personality configuration.

ch-09.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration
ch-09.description: Design a subagent strategy for a complex coding project.

ch-10.title: CI/CD Pipeline with Claude Code
ch-10.description: Create a GitHub Actions pipeline that uses Claude Code for automated reviews.

ch-11.title: Custom Slash Command
ch-11.description: Create a custom slash command for Claude Code.

ch-12.title: Debugging strategy prompt
ch-12.description: Write a systematic debugging prompt for Claude Code.

live-01.title: Two Sum
live-01.description: Find two indices whose values sum to target. Classic HashMap approach.

live-02.title: Palindrome Check
live-02.description: Check whether a string reads the same forward and backward.

live-03.title: FizzBuzz
live-03.description: Classic FizzBuzz: divisible by 3 → Fizz, by 5 → Buzz, by both → FizzBuzz.

live-04.title: Longest Substring Without Repeating
live-04.description: Length of longest substring without repeated characters – sliding window.

live-05.title: Valid Anagram
live-05.description: Check if two strings are anagrams (same characters, different order).

live-06.title: Binary Search
live-06.description: Classic binary search in a sorted array. O(log n).

live-07.title: Sliding Window Maximum
live-07.description: For each window of size k, find the maximum. Deque / monotonic stack.

live-08.title: Minimum Window Substring
live-08.description: Shortest substring of s containing all characters from t. Hard sliding window.

live-09.title: Fibonacci with Memoization (DP)
live-09.description: Fibonacci number with dynamic programming (memo) in O(n).

live-10.title: BFS – Shortest Path in Matrix
live-10.description: Shortest distance from start to goal in a 0/1 matrix. Breadth-first search.

live-11.title: Trapping Rain Water
live-11.description: How much rain water can be trapped between the bars? Two pointers / DP.

live-12.title: Merge Overlapping Intervals
live-12.description: Merge overlapping intervals. Sort and linear scan.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to sync your progress across devices
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to save your progress
auth.offlineNote: The app works without an account. Your progress is stored locally in your browser. With an account you can sync it across devices.
auth.privacyNote: By registering you agree to our privacy policy. You can delete your account at any time (GDPR Art. 17).
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.sessionDesc: Sign out to end your session. Your local progress will be kept.
auth.deleteDesc: Permanently delete your account and all server-side data. Your local browser progress will be kept. This action cannot be undone.
auth.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? All data will be deleted.
auth.subscriptionNone: You don't have a subscription. After registration you can choose a plan or lifetime access.
auth.subscriptionLifetime: Lifetime access – no subscription, no need to cancel.
auth.subscriptionCanceledAtEnd: Your subscription has been canceled and ends on {{date}}. You have full access until then.
auth.subscriptionCancelConfirm: Cancel your subscription at the end of the current billing period? You will keep access until then.
auth.subscriptionCancelError: Cancellation failed. Please try again later.

templates.title: Project Templates
templates.subtitle: Start your next project with Claude Code. Copy the CLAUDE.md, follow the steps and use the prepared prompts.
templates.noTemplates: No templates found for this filter.
templates.copyClaudeMdDesc: Copy the CLAUDE.md into your project directory. It gives Claude Code the full context.
templates.followStepsDesc: Work through the steps in order. Each step has a prepared Claude Code prompt.
templates.copyPromptsDesc: Copy each prompt directly into Claude Code. The prompts are optimized for best results.
templates.readyToStartDesc: First copy the CLAUDE.md into your project directory, then work through the steps with the prepared prompts.

tpl-todo.title: Todo App
tpl-todo.description: A modern todo app with React and TypeScript. Perfect for beginners taking their first steps with Claude Code.

tpl-portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
tpl-portfolio.description: An elegant portfolio website with HTML, CSS and Tailwind. Ideal for getting started with web design using Claude Code.

tpl-rest-api.title: REST API
tpl-rest-api.description: A complete REST API with Express and Prisma. Learn backend development with Claude Code.

tpl-fullstack-blog.title: Fullstack Blog
tpl-fullstack-blog.description: A complete blog with React frontend and Express backend. Fullstack development with Claude Code.

tpl-saas-starter.title: SaaS Starter
tpl-saas-starter.description: A complete SaaS boilerplate with Next.js, Stripe and authentication. For ambitious projects.

cap-01.title: Todo App
cap-01.description: Build a complete todo app with CRUD operations, LocalStorage persistence and a modern UI.

cap-02.title: Weather Dashboard
cap-02.description: Create a weather dashboard that fetches current weather data from an API and displays it clearly.

cap-03.title: Blog with CMS
cap-03.description: Build a full-featured blog with Markdown editor, categories, tags and admin panel.

cap-04.title: E-Commerce Shop
cap-04.description: Develop an online shop with product catalog, shopping cart, checkout and Stripe integration.

cap-05.title: SaaS Dashboard
cap-05.description: Build a professional SaaS dashboard with auth, team management and analytics charts.

cap-06.title: AI Chatbot
cap-06.description: Develop an AI chatbot with streaming responses, conversation history and custom prompts.

freelancer.heroSubtitle: 8 hands-on business modules: From positioning to client acquisition to scaling. Learn how to launch your freelance career with Claude Code.
freelancer.benefit1Desc: No theory – every module delivers immediately actionable steps for your AI freelance business.
freelancer.benefit2Desc: From your first client to 15,000+ EUR/month – with concrete milestones and timelines.
freelancer.benefit3Desc: Use Claude Code not just for coding, but also for proposals, communication, and quality assurance.
